name: Vernon Duke
abstract: Vernon Duke (10 October [O.S. 27 September] 1903 –  16 January 1969) was a Russian-born American composer and songwriter who also wrote under his birth name, Vladimir Dukelsky.

about_quotes.speaker: Sol Yaged
about_quotes.evidence: He was a very dear friend of mine. I did a Broadway show with him called “Sweet By and By.”
